definitions.text: The kind, condition, and/or the set of characteristics of something, as opposed to the quantity of something.
examples: The lattice structure of a steel profoundly changes its qualities.
While being impulsive can be great for artists, it is not a desirable quality for engineers.
Security, stability, and efficiency are good qualities of an operating system.

definitions.text: Good characteristics in particular; level of excellence; freedom of faults and flaws.
examples: This school is well-known for having teachers of high quality.
Quality of life is usually determined by health, education, and income.
